scripts.run:sample:create: flue run openscad --target node --id sample-create --env .env --payload '{"mode":"create","prompt":"Create a simple parametric box with a centered cylindrical hole."}'
scripts.run:sample:revise: flue run openscad --target node --id sample-revise --env .env --payload '{"mode":"revise","prompt":"Make the box taller and widen the hole.","currentCode":"difference() { cube([20,20,10], center=true); cylinder(h=20, r=3, center=true, $fn=48); }"}'
